seoTitle: Jianghai Solutions | Inverters, Photovoltaic, New Energy Applications | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Jianghai capacitor solutions for industrial inverters, photovoltaic inverters, new energy vehicles, rail transit. Selection guidance, technical support, BOM recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the typical application solution of Jianghai capacitors in industrial inverters?
faqs.answer: Jianghai provides complete capacitor solutions for industrial inverters: 1) DC-Link capacitors: CD139 series screw terminal aluminum electrolytic capacitors (e.g., 10000uF/450V) or DC-Link film capacitors (e.g., 100uF/800V), capacitance selected based on power, voltage rating 450V-800V; 2) Snubber capacitors: 0.47uF/1200V film capacitors to suppress IGBT switching spikes; 3) Control power capacitors: CD11 series small aluminum electrolytic capacitors (e.g., 1000uF/25V). Complete solutions include BOM list, reference design, and FAE technical support.

faqs.question: What are the features of Jianghai photovoltaic inverter capacitor solutions?
faqs.answer: Jianghai photovoltaic inverter capacitor solution features: 1) Long lifespan design: Film capacitors lifespan up to 100,000 hours, meeting PV system 20-25 year service requirements; 2) High reliability: Self-healing characteristics, low ESR, wide temperature range; 3) High efficiency: Low loss design, improving system overall efficiency by 0.5-1%; 4) Compact: Compared to aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors are smaller and lighter; 5) Environmental-friendly: No electrolyte, no leakage risk. Recommended solutions: 10-20kW single-phase inverters use 100uF/800V DC-Link capacitors, 20-50kW three-phase inverters use 150-300uF/800V capacitors.

faqs.question: What are the applications of Jianghai supercapacitors in new energy vehicles?
faqs.answer: Jianghai supercapacitor applications in new energy vehicles: 1) 12V start-stop systems: 6x 300F/2.7V EDLC in series (16.2V), supporting fast engine start, cycle life 500,000+ cycles; 2) 48V mild hybrid systems: 18x 300F/2.7V in series (48.6V), combined with lithium batteries for instantaneous high power output; 3) Energy recovery: Utilizing supercapacitor high power density for fast braking energy absorption; 4) Emergency power: Providing emergency power when main battery fails for safety. Jianghai supercapacitors feature wide temperature range (-40C to +65C), suitable for harsh automotive environments.

solutions.title: Industrial Inverter Capacitor Solution
solutions.description: Complete capacitor solutions for industrial inverters including DC-Link, snubber, and control power capacitors
solutions.longDescription: Jianghai provides complete capacitor solutions for industrial inverters, covering DC-Link support, IGBT protection, control power, and other aspects. Solutions use Jianghai CD139/CD135 series large aluminum electrolytic capacitors or DC-Link film capacitors as DC-Link capacitors, featuring long lifespan, high ripple current, and low ESR; dedicated film snubber capacitors to suppress IGBT switching spikes; CD11 series small aluminum electrolytic capacitors for control circuit power. The complete solution has been verified in extensive field applications with high reliability, long lifespan, and suitability for various industrial environments.
benefits: High reliability design, MTBF over 100,000 hours
Long lifespan, aluminum electrolytic capacitors 8,000-10,000 hours, film capacitors 100,000+ hours
High ripple current capability, meeting demanding inverter operating conditions
Complete protection design, overvoltage, overtemperature, overcurrent protection
Complete BOM and technical support provided

coreAdvantages.description: CD139 series ripple current up to 15A+, meeting high-power inverter requirements

coreAdvantages.title: Long Lifespan Design
coreAdvantages.description: Using high-quality electrolyte and aluminum foil, rated lifespan 8,000-10,000 hours at 85C

customerCases.challenge: Required DC-Link capacitors with 20+ year lifespan

customerCases.results: System design lifespan reached 25 years, volume reduced by 40%, efficiency improved by 0.8%

faeInsights.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeInsights.content: Industrial inverters are a key application area for Jianghai capacitors. For selection, recommend DC-Link capacitance calculated at 100-200uF per kW power, voltage rating selected at 1.25x above working voltage. For high-power inverters (>75kW), recommend film capacitor solutions, although initial cost is higher, long-term reliability is better. Note to maintain appropriate spacing during installation for heat dissipation and configure balancing resistors.
keyTakeaways: Voltage margin: Rated voltage >= Working voltage x 1.25
Pay attention to heat dissipation design, maintain appropriate spacing
Configure balancing resistors to prevent series imbalance

solutions.title: Photovoltaic Inverter Capacitor Solution
solutions.description: Long lifespan DC-Link and filter capacitor solutions for photovoltaic inverters
solutions.longDescription: Jianghai provides professional capacitor solutions for photovoltaic inverters, with core products being DC-Link film capacitors. Compared to traditional aluminum electrolytic capacitors, Jianghai film capacitors feature ultra-long lifespan (100,000+ hours), low ESR, self-healing characteristics, fully meeting PV system 20-25 year service requirements. Solutions also include AC-side filter capacitors, EMI suppression capacitors, providing full power range solutions from residential (5kW) to commercial (100kW+).
benefits: Ultra-long lifespan, 100,000+ hours, meeting 25-year service requirements
Low ESR design, system efficiency improvement 0.5-1%
Self-healing characteristics, high reliability, no sudden failure risk
Environmental-friendly design, no electrolyte, no leakage risk
Small size, light weight, saving installation space

faeInsights.author: Jianghai FAE Team
faeInsights.content: Photovoltaic inverters are the core application market for Jianghai film capacitors. For selection recommendations: 1) Voltage selection: 800V capacitors for DC-link below 600V, 1000V capacitors for below 800V; 2) Capacitance selection: Calculate at 5-10uF per kW; 3) Temperature derating: Lifespan doubles for every 10C temperature decrease; 4) Installation notes: Use appropriate torque for fixing, avoid mechanical stress.
keyTakeaways: Voltage margin: Rated voltage >= Working voltage x 1.25
Temperature derating: Lifespan doubles every 10C decrease
Film capacitors suitable for long lifespan requirement applications
Note installation torque, avoid mechanical stress
